suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the E2E test port conventions: frontend runs on 3101, backend on 3100. Tests hardcode these URLs and should read from environment or playwright config instead.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross-flows-comprehensive.spec.ts uses hardcoded BACKEND_URL='http://localhost:3100' and FRONTEND_URL='http://localhost:3101'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update skill procedure to reflect actual test file locations: Playwright E2E tests live in /e2e/*.spec.ts, not backend-python/tests/
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Skill says tests at backend-python/tests/ but actual E2E tests at e2e/*.spec.ts

sharedStateObservations.observation: E2E tests use localhost:3100/3101 hardcoded URLs instead of reading from environment or playwright config. The AGENTS.md specifies port range 3100-3199 but doesn't document this convention for tests.
Backend tests use synchronous TestClient but skill.md shows async examples with AsyncClient.
sharedStateObservations.reason: Both approaches work; consistency is desirable but not blocking

sharedStateObservations.observation: The e2e-worker skill specifies tests should be in backend-python/tests/ but actual Playwright E2E tests are in /e2e/ directory.
sharedStateObservations.reason: Non-blocking, skill procedure can be updated separately
